evals.prompt: I want to create a skill that converts JSON to CSV — it should read a JSON file and output a clean CSV with headers
evals.expected: Skill creator guides through intent capture, writes SKILL.md draft, creates test cases in evals/evals.json, runs them, and presents viewer

evals.prompt: My draft-email skill isn't triggering when users say 'write me an email' — can you help me improve the description?
evals.expected: Skill creator goes to description optimization path: generates trigger eval queries, shows HTML review, runs run_loop.py, applies best_description

evals.prompt: Run evals on my existing skill at ~/.openclaw/skills/my-skill and show me the results
evals.expected: Skill creator reads existing skill, spawns with-skill and baseline runs in parallel, generates benchmark.json, launches eval viewer
